commands.review_summary:
The PR retargets the release/2026.6.11 Plugin ClawHub publish job to a newer pinned ClawHub package-publish reusable workflow SHA and updates the workflow acceptance test expectation.

PR surface: Tests -3, Config 0. Total -3 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes: the release branch base still points at the old publisher pin, and the old ClawHub detector checks loose `skills/` markers before `openclaw.plugin.json`. I did not establish a live failing workflow dispatch in this review.
